---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new template, example, or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to see?**
A clear description of the feature or content you'd like added.

**Use case:**
How would this help you or others building ElevenLabs agents?

**Category:**
- [ ] New agent template
- [ ] New webhook example (framework: ___)
- [ ] New custom tool example
- [ ] New checklist
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Integration example (service: ___)
- [ ] Other

**Would you be willing to contribute this?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] I can help review/test
- [ ] No, just suggesting
